title: Alex's Caves - Enlightend Compat
description: Remove duplicate items and blocks with the goal of integrating both Alex's Caves and Enlightened so they work as if they were a single mod!
body:
**The goal of these compat mods I'm making is to make mods work better together in modpacks by removing duplicate items, mobs, and blocks. It ensures that anything dependent on the removed items, mobs and blocks still works by redirecting those dependencies to the remaining equivalent items, mobs and blocks.**
## List of changes
### Removed Duplicate Items
- Alex's Caves Uranium
### Removed Duplicate Blocks
- Alex's Caves Block of Uranium
- Enlightened Irradium Lamp
- Enlightened Nuclear Bomb
- Enlightened Nuclear Furnace
### Crafting Recipe Adjustments
- Every Alex's Caves recipe that required uranium now requires irradium (now renamed to uranium)
### Loot Table Adjustments
- Alex's Caves Radrock Uranium Ore now drops irradium (now renamed to uranium)
- Alex's Caves Tremorzilla loot table includes irradium, depleted irradium and uranium shard (removed uranium).
